SEARCH
Package dev.jeka.core.api.depmanagement

Class JkQualifiedDependencySet

java.lang.Object
dev.jeka.core.api.depmanagement.JkQualifiedDependencySet
public class JkQualifiedDependencySet extends Object
Represents a set of qualified dependencies.

  • Method Details

    • of

      public static JkQualifiedDependencySet of()
      Creates a new empty instance of JkQualifiedDependencySet.

    • ofDependencies

      public static JkQualifiedDependencySet ofDependencies(List<JkDependency> dependencies)
      Returns a new JkQualifiedDependencySet based on the provided list of JkDependency objects.

    • of

      public static JkQualifiedDependencySet of(List<JkQualifiedDependency> qualifiedDependencies)
      Creates a new JkQualifiedDependencySet based on the provided list of JkQualifiedDependencies.

    • of

      public static JkQualifiedDependencySet of(JkDependencySet dependencySet)
      Creates a new JkQualifiedDependencySet based on the provided JkDependencySet.

    • getEntries

      public List<JkQualifiedDependency> getEntries()
      Retrieves the list of qualified dependencies.

    • getDependencies

      public List<JkDependency> getDependencies()
      Retrieves the list of dependencies.

    • getCoordinateDependencies

      public List<JkCoordinateDependency> getCoordinateDependencies()
      Retrieves the list of coordinate dependencies from the JkQualifiedDependencySet. Coordinate dependencies are dependencies that have module coordinates and can be used for dependency resolution.

    • getGlobalExclusions

      public Set<JkDependencyExclusion> getGlobalExclusions()
      Returns the set of global exclusions for this JkQualifiedDependencySet. These exclusions only apply to transitive dependencies and do not affect directly declared dependencies.

    • getVersionProvider

      public JkVersionProvider getVersionProvider()
      Returns the version provider associated with this JkQualifiedDependencySet.

    • findByCoordinateGroupId

      public List<JkQualifiedDependency> findByCoordinateGroupId(String moduleId)
      Finds and returns a list of qualified dependencies based on the specified module ID.

    • findExplicitDeclaredVersion

      public JkVersion findExplicitDeclaredVersion(JkModuleId moduleId)
      Finds and returns the explicitly declared version of a dependency for the given module ID. If no explicitly declared version is found, returns an unspecified version.
      Parameters:
      moduleId - the module ID for which the explicitly declared version is to be retrieved.
      Returns:
      the explicitly declared version of the dependency, or an unspecified version if none is found.

    • remove

      public JkQualifiedDependencySet remove(JkDependency dependency)
      Removes the specified JkDependency from the JkQualifiedDependencySet.

    • remove

      public JkQualifiedDependencySet remove(JkQualifiedDependency dependency)
      Removes the specified JkQualifiedDependency from the JkQualifiedDependencySet.

    • and

      public JkQualifiedDependencySet and(JkQualifiedDependency qualifiedDependency)
      Adds a new qualified dependency to the existing dependencies. The qualifier is used to differentiate between multiple dependencies with the same module coordinates.

    • and

      public JkQualifiedDependencySet and(String qualifier, JkDependency dependency)
      Adds a new qualified dependency to the existing dependencies. The qualifier is used to differentiate between multiple dependencies with the same module coordinates.

    • and

      public JkQualifiedDependencySet and(String qualifier, String moduleDependencyDescriptor)
      Adds a new qualified dependency to the existing dependencies. The qualifier is used to differentiate between multiple dependencies with the same module coordinates.

    • remove

      public JkQualifiedDependencySet remove(String dep)
      Removes the specified dependency from the JkQualifiedDependencySet.

    • replaceQualifier

      public JkQualifiedDependencySet replaceQualifier(JkDependency dependency, String qualifier)
      Replaces the qualifier of the specified dependency in the JkQualifiedDependencySet.

    • replaceQualifier

      public JkQualifiedDependencySet replaceQualifier(String dependency, String qualifier)
      Replaces the qualifier of the specified dependency in the JkQualifiedDependencySet.

    • withQualifiersOnly

      public JkQualifiedDependencySet withQualifiersOnly(String... qualifiers)
      Filters and returns a new JkQualifiedDependencySet containing only the JkQualifiedDependencies that have the specified qualifiers.

    • withCoordinateDependenciesOnly

      public JkQualifiedDependencySet withCoordinateDependenciesOnly()
      Filters and Returns a new JkQualifiedDependencySet containing only the JkQualifiedDependencies whose underlying JkDependency is an instance of JkCoordinateDependency.

    • withGlobalExclusions

      public JkQualifiedDependencySet withGlobalExclusions(Set<JkDependencyExclusion> exclusions)
      These exclusions only stands for dependencies that are retrieved transitively. This means that this not involves dependencies explicitly declared here.

    • withVersionProvider

      public JkQualifiedDependencySet withVersionProvider(JkVersionProvider versionProvider)
      These exclusions only stands for dependencies that are retrieved transitively. This means that this not involves dependencies explicitly declared here.

    • withResolvedBoms

      public JkQualifiedDependencySet withResolvedBoms(JkRepoSet repos)
      Replace the version provider of this object

    • computeIdeDependencies

      public static JkQualifiedDependencySet computeIdeDependencies(JkDependencySet allCompileDeps, JkDependencySet allRuntimeDeps, JkDependencySet allTestDeps, JkCoordinate.ConflictStrategy strategy)
      Computes the set of IDE dependencies based on the given compile, runtime, and test dependencies.

    • computeIdeDependencies

      public static JkQualifiedDependencySet computeIdeDependencies(JkDependencySet allCompileDeps, JkDependencySet allRuntimeDeps, JkDependencySet allTestDeps)
      Computes the set of IDE dependencies based on the given compile, runtime, and test dependencies.

    • computeIvyPublishDependencies

      public static JkQualifiedDependencySet computeIvyPublishDependencies(JkDependencySet allCompileDeps, JkDependencySet allRuntimeDeps, JkDependencySet allTestDeps, JkCoordinate.ConflictStrategy strategy)
      Computes the set of qualified dependencies for publishing using Ivy.

    • getIvyTargetConfigurations

      public static String getIvyTargetConfigurations(JkTransitivity transitivity)
      Returns the Ivy target configurations for the given transitivity.

    • getDependenciesHavingQualifier

      public List<JkDependency> getDependenciesHavingQualifier(String... qualifiers)
      Returns a List of JkDependency objects that have the specified qualifiers.

    • assertNoUnspecifiedVersion

      public JkQualifiedDependencySet assertNoUnspecifiedVersion()
      Checks if any module in the dependency set has an unspecified version.

    • toResolvedModuleVersions

      public JkQualifiedDependencySet toResolvedModuleVersions()
      Fills the dependencies without specified version with the version supplied by the JkVersionProvider.

    • md5

      public String md5()
      Computes the MD5 hash of the current instance and returns it as a string. The string is suitable to be used as a file name.
